name: Use of Pointer Subtraction to Determine Size
description: The code subtracts one pointer from another to calculate a size or length without verifying that both pointers reference the same memory region. This can produce incorrect size calculations leading to buffer overflows or other memory corruption.
detection_pattern: A TRANSFORM[pointer_subtraction] node computes a size by subtracting two pointer values, and the result flows into a TRANSFORM[allocation] or TRANSFORM[copy] node without a CONTROL[same_region_check] mediator verifying both pointers belong to the same memory object.
